title: cyclosorus polycarpos
intro: Cyclosorus polycarpos, also known as the Chinese Leptosporangiate fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus polycarpos include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
